name: Isaac
bio:
Priest of a peaceful village, endowed with the power of a mysterious holy scripture. He fights evil with the Judgment Holy Scripture and becomes a "Violent Priest" in the Spirit Heroes Faction.

Role: Physical Damage Dealer
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero; the lower its HP, the higher the damage it deals; has a chance to stun enemy units.

skillSlots.name: Enraged Jab
skillSlots.description: Deals 221% P.DMG to the enemy with highest HP. If target's current HP exceeds Isaac's, has 50% probability to deal additional DMG equal to 10% of self Max HP.

skillSlots.name: Saintly King's Smite
skillSlots.description: Attacks the column containing the enemy Hero with highest ATK, dealing 195% P.DMG with a 50% chance to apply 1 stack of [Holy Seal].

effects.name: Execution of Justice
effects.description: [Holy Strike of Destruction] deals additional DMG equal to 22% of Isaac's lost HP.
